summary: Dashboard summary box, resource usage layout, and weather error handling.

changed: Dashboard metrics (unread email, chat, passwords, bills) sit in one Summary box with live resource usage underneath
Resource card title is now Live Nucleus resource usage
fixed: Weather errors no longer get overwritten by transient location failures
Location lookup retries automatically when the fix is temporarily unavailable
WeatherKit authentication failures show a clearer message instead of a misleading location error
